basic_details.job_title: IIM Nagpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Resident Medical Officer/ Senior Medical Officer Post
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Nagpur (IIM Nagpur)
basic_details.post_name: Resident Medical Officer/ Senior Medical Officer
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Nagpur (IIM Nagpur) has released the official Resident Medical Officer/ Senior Medical Officer Notification 2026 at the official website of Indian Institute of Management Nagpur. Has been announced under the IIM Nagpur Resident Medical Officer/ Senior Medical Officer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a qualification of MBBS from a recognised University/Institute, registered with the Medical Council of India/State Medical Council, and desirable MD/PG Diploma in General Medicine/Family Medicine/Community Health or equivalent, with a maximum age limit of 45

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS from a recognised University/Institute, MD/PG Diploma
qualification.details: MBBS degree from a recognised University/Institute. Must be registered with the Medical Council of India/State Medical Council. MD/PG Diploma in General Medicine/Family Medicine/Community Health or equivalent is desirable.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Nagpur Resident Medical Officer/ Senior Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Nagpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Nagpur Resident Medical Officer/ Senior Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIM Nagpur Resident Medical Officer/ Senior Medical Officer positions is 16th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognised University/Institute and be registered with the Medical Council of India/State Medical Council. An MD/PG Diploma in General Medicine/Family Medicine/Community Health or equivalent is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Resident Medical Officer/ Senior Medical Officer post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of IIM Nagpur. The "Apply Online" link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the IIM Nagpur Resident Medical Officer/ Senior Medical Officer posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will primarily involve an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for a Contractual basis. Candidates will be appointed on a contract for the specified period.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIM Nagpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Nagpur is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any specific documents required during the application process?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates will need to upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and relevant certificates in the prescribed format during the online application process.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, applications for the IIM Nagpur Resident Medical Officer/ Senior Medical Officer recruitment must be submitted strictly through the online mode. Offline applications will not be accepted.
